title: Instacart Order
description: Represents an order in the Instacart Connect system, covering delivery, pickup, and last mile fulfillment types with their associated items, service options, and status lifecycle.

id.description: The unique identifier for the order.

user_id.description: The retailer's unique identifier for the customer who placed the order.

status.description: The current status of the order in the fulfillment lifecycle.

fulfillment_type.description: The type of fulfillment for this order.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the order was created.

estimated_delivery_at.description: The estimated delivery or pickup time.

delivery_instructions.description: Special instructions for the delivery driver or pickup process.

items.description: The items included in the order.

Store.description: A retail store on the Instacart platform.

id.description: The unique identifier for the store.

ServiceOption.description: A fulfillment time slot selected for the order.

id.description: The unique identifier for the service option.

date.description: The date of the service option.

window_starts_at.description: The start time of the fulfillment window.

window_ends_at.description: The end time of the fulfillment window.

fulfillment_type.description: The fulfillment type for this service option.

address_line_2.description: Additional address information such as apartment or suite number.

name.description: The display name of the product.

status.description: The current status of the item during fulfillment.

replacement_status.description: The customer's decision on a suggested replacement.

refunded.description: Whether this item has been refunded.

Replacement.description: A replacement product suggested by the shopper.

product_id.description: The product identifier of the replacement.

name.description: The name of the replacement product.

Shopper.description: The Instacart shopper assigned to fulfill the order.

name.description: The first name of the shopper.

phone_number.description: A masked phone number for contacting the shopper.
